runTitle: v8.11.169 Current Vercel Playwright MCP Rerun
coveredSurfaces: Feature card modal independent state reset
skippedSurfaces: React Flow topology modal deep interaction

expertAssessments.rationale: The rerun confirmed landing, feature-card modals, diagram toggles, modal state scoping, Vibe CI/CD tab, and dashboard overview render on Vercel production.
The stale Playwright MCP context was recovered with browser_close, then the rerun completed with zero console errors or warnings.
Production /api/version reports v8.11.169, /api/health is healthy, and Vercel usage remains billed 0.0000 USD.

usageChecks.summary: Billing period 2026-05-01..2026-05-18: effective 10.7667 USD, billed 0.0000 USD, chargeCount 9744. No unexpected billed usage.

artifacts.label: v8.11.169 current Vercel Playwright MCP rerun
artifacts.note: Recovered stale MCP tab state, then verified landing, modal diagrams, Vibe CI/CD tab, dashboard overview, console cleanliness, API health/version, and Vercel usage.

notes: This run is a user-requested rerun on an already-covered v8.11.169 deployment, so countsTowardSummary=false prevents aggregate QA totals from being inflated.

Two /api/system requests were net::ERR_ABORTED during dashboard navigation; the surrounding /api/system HEAD/GET and dashboard data requests returned 200 and no console errors or warnings were reported.
